module.name: ast/statements
module.description: Higher-level AST statement helpers for return and boolean-literal evaluation.

scenarios.name: should return the boolean literal from a return-bearing statement
scenarios.given: a return statement or reducible block statement that returns a boolean literal

scenarios.name: should return null when the return-bearing statement is not a boolean literal return
scenarios.given: a statement that does not reduce to a boolean literal return

scenarios.name: should return the boolean literal value from a boolean literal expression
scenarios.given: a Literal expression whose value is boolean

scenarios.name: should return null for non-boolean literal expressions
scenarios.given: an expression that is not a boolean literal

scenarios.name: should return a direct return statement unchanged
scenarios.given: a statement that is already a ReturnStatement

scenarios.name: should return the single return statement from a one-statement block
scenarios.given: a BlockStatement containing exactly one ReturnStatement

scenarios.name: should return null when a statement or block cannot be reduced to a single return
scenarios.given: a non-return statement or a block that does not contain exactly one ReturnStatement
